title: Pitareeze family
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Pitareeze_family.jpg|thumb|300px|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] come into the service of the Pitareeze family.]]

The '''Pitareeze family''' was a family from [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]] that owned and operated [[Kalarba Safari]].<ref>[[Droids (1994) 2|''Droids'' (1994) 2]]</ref>

When [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] escaped from [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B's]] stolen ship via a [[Escape pod/Legends|lifepod]], they landed in a lake next to the family, which was eating a picnic at the time. The droids introduced themselves and offered to help the family at their factory.<ref name="Star Wars: Droids Special">''[[Star Wars: Droids Special]]''</ref>

{{Stub}}

==Family members==
*[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Pitareeze]]
**[[Jarth Pitareeze]]
**[[Meg Pitareeze]], Jarth's wife
***[[Nak Pitareeze]], son of Meg and Jarth

==Family tree==
 [[Jarth Pitareeze]]--+--[[Meg Pitareeze]]
  |
[[Nak Pitareeze]]

==Behind the scenes==
It is unknown whether the grandfather in [[Star Wars: Droids Special|''Star Wars: Droids Special 1'']] was the father of Jarth or Meg. Nak only identifies him as "Baron" and "Grandfather."
